title: Skip tests conditionally based on version

comments.body:
Hey, @Luap99 and @Honny1 . based on the comments of https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/567#pullrequestreview-3136560942 I decided to open this PR to skip based on Podman's version. I decided to leave the os_release code because it could help testing downstream backports sometimes.

what do you think?

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *Honny1*, *inknos* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman-py). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [inknos] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
i wasnt sure if this repo blocks on testing-farm so i added a hold label while that completes.

> i wasnt sure if this repo blocks on testing-farm so i added a hold label while that completes.

actually good point, I need to update GH to block on fedora 43. currently it only blocks up to f42
